meta.title: payload-reserve | Booking & Reservation Plugin for Payload CMS
meta.description: Open-source reservation plugin for Payload CMS 3.x — add bookings, appointments, and scheduling to your Payload app in minutes.

hero.subheading: Drop-in booking, scheduling, and availability for Payload 3.x — salons, hotels, restaurants, events, and more.

useCases.label: A few of many use cases
useCases.footnote: The plugin adapts to any business that needs time-based or resource-based booking.

features.label: Features
features.subheading: payload-reserve handles the complex scheduling logic so you can focus on your product.

items.title: Configurable for Any Use Case
items.description: Services, resources, and schedules adapt to salons, hotels, restaurants, venues, and anything else that takes bookings.

items.title: Calendar Admin View
items.description: Month/week/day calendar replaces the default Payload list view — at-a-glance availability for the whole team.

items.title: Double-Booking Prevention
items.description: Server-side conflict detection with configurable buffer times between reservations.

items.title: Three Booking Types
items.description: Fixed-duration (appointment), flexible end time, or full-day bookings — set per resource.

items.title: Configurable Status Machine
items.description: Define your own statuses, transitions, and terminal states — e.g. pending → confirmed → completed → cancelled.

items.title: Capacity Management
items.description: quantity > 1 allows concurrent bookings; per-reservation or per-guest capacity modes.

items.title: Multi-Resource Reservations
items.description: A single booking can span multiple resources simultaneously via the items array.

items.title: Hooks API
items.description: Seven lifecycle hooks (beforeCreate, afterConfirm, afterCancel, etc.) for plugging in email, Stripe, or any external system.

items.title: Public REST API
items.description: Five pre-built endpoints: availability check, slot listing, booking creation, cancellation, and customer search.

demos.label: Live Demos
demos.headline: See it in action
demos.subheading: Fully working demos for every industry — explore the admin panel and booking flow.

salon.name: Lumière Salon
salon.description: Per-stylist booking with service menus, buffer times between appointments, and optional Stripe deposit collection.

hotel.name: Grand Hotel
hotel.description: Check-in/out date pickers, room type selection, capacity management, and guest communication all in Payload admin.

restaurant.name: Maison Restaurant
restaurant.tagline: Table booking with party size management
restaurant.description: Time-slotted dining reservations with configurable party sizes, special requests, and automatic table assignment.

events.name: Event Venue
events.description: Full-day event bookings, capacity limits, multi-resource reservations, and ticketing — all from one plugin.

privateDemo.label: Private Demo
privateDemo.headline: Experience the full admin panel
privateDemo.subtitle: Request a private demo instance — you'll receive an email with login credentials for the Payload admin panel where you can add services, manage reservations, configure schedules, and see exactly how a reservation-powered website works. No technical knowledge required.
privateDemo.audience: Perfect for non-developers exploring the system

developerSection.label: For Developers
developerSection.headline: Run it on your machine
developerSection.subtitle: Clone the demo apps monorepo and run any template locally with a single command.
developerSection.note: Requires Node ≥18, pnpm, and MongoDB. Demo monorepo coming soon — star the repo to get notified.

steps.title: Install the plugin
steps.description: Add payload-reserve to your Payload 3.x project in seconds.

steps.title: Configure your resources
steps.description: Define bookable resources — stylists, rooms, tables, or venues — with custom availability and rules.

steps.title: Go live
steps.description: Bookings appear instantly in your Payload admin. Use the REST API to power any frontend.

cta.label: Open Source · MIT License
cta.headline: Ready to add bookings to your Payload project?
cta.subtitle: Try a live demo or dive into the documentation to see how fast you can get up and running.

adminUI.label: Admin Interface
adminUI.headline: Complete booking management, built into Payload
adminUI.subtitle: payload-reserve adds a full reservation management interface directly to your Payload CMS admin panel — calendar view, reservations list, status management, and more.
slides: Dashboard - Pending reservations wait for confirmation or cancellation
Dashboard Module - View today's reservations at a glance

footer.description: Open source reservation and booking plugin for Payload CMS 3.x projects.

meta.title: Try a Live Demo - payload-reserve
meta.description: Spin up a pre-seeded demo and explore the full booking flow in under a minute.

demoRequestPage.headline: Request a demo
demoRequestPage.description: Fill in your email and we'll spin up a pre-seeded environment. You'll receive credentials within a couple of minutes. Demos auto-expire after {hours} hours.

demoRequestForm.disclaimerLine1: By submitting, you agree to receive a single transactional email with demo credentials.
demoRequestForm.disclaimerLine2: Demos are auto-deleted after expiry. No account required.

errors.createFailed: Failed to create demo. Please try again.
errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.

demoStatus.failedSubtitle: Please try requesting a new demo.

success.title: Your demo is ready
success.subtitle: Credentials have been sent to your email.
success.footnote: The demo is pre-seeded with realistic data. All data is permanently deleted on expiry.

demoDetails.screenshotsLivePrompt: Visit the <liveDemo>live demo</liveDemo> to see it in action
demoDetails.docsNote: See the <docs>full documentation</docs> for all available options.
demoDetails.ctaSubtitle: Try the live demo or request your own private environment.

salon.name: Lumière Salon
salon.tagline: Appointment scheduling built for beauty professionals
salon.description: A complete salon booking system built with payload-reserve. Clients book specific stylists, choose from service menus, and pay a deposit - all without leaving your site.

features.title: Per-specialist scheduling
features.description: Clients select a stylist then see their individual calendar and open slots.

features.title: Service menus with durations
features.description: Define services (cut, colour, treatment) with exact durations; slot length adjusts automatically.

features.title: Buffer times
features.description: Automatic 5-minute gap between appointments; no manual blocking needed.

features.title: Email confirmations
features.description: Confirmation and cancellation emails sent automatically via the plugin's lifecycle hooks.

features.title: Stripe payment gate
features.description: Charge a deposit or card-on-file before confirming - reduces no-shows.

features.title: Cancellation policy
features.description: 24-hour minimum notice enforced server-side; late cancellations flagged for staff.

hotel.name: Grand Hotel
hotel.tagline: Room reservations with multi-night stay management
hotel.description: A hotel reservation system powered by payload-reserve. Guests select check-in and check-out dates, choose room types, and receive booking confirmations - all managed from Payload admin.

features.title: Multi-night stays
features.description: Date-range booking with check-in and check-out. Conflict detection prevents double-booking.

features.title: Room types
features.description: Define room categories (Standard, Deluxe, Suite) each with their own availability and pricing.

features.title: Capacity management
features.description: Set per-room capacity and automatically prevent overbooking across your property.

features.title: Guest management
features.description: Capture guest details, special requests, and preferences in Payload collections.

restaurant.name: Maison Restaurant
restaurant.tagline: Table booking with party size and time slot management
restaurant.description: A restaurant reservation system built on payload-reserve. Guests pick a time slot, specify party size, and add special requests - automatically assigned to available tables.

features.title: Time slot booking
features.description: Define service windows (lunch, dinner) and slot intervals. Guests pick from available times.

features.title: Party size
features.description: Guests specify their party size and the system matches them to an appropriately sized table.

features.title: Special requests
features.description: Guests add dietary requirements, occasion notes, or seating preferences at booking.

features.title: Auto table assignment
features.description: Tables are assigned automatically based on party size, availability, and capacity.

events.name: Event Venue
events.tagline: Event scheduling with capacity and multi-resource booking
events.description: A venue booking system powered by payload-reserve. Event organizers reserve spaces, select configurations, and manage capacity - with conflict detection across all spaces.

features.title: Capacity limits
features.description: Each space has a maximum capacity. The system prevents overbooking automatically.

features.title: Multi-resource booking
features.description: Book multiple spaces or resources in a single reservation - great for complex events.

features.title: Event types
features.description: Configure different event categories (conference, wedding, concert) with distinct rules.

features.title: Ticketing integration
features.description: Hook into Stripe or your ticketing system to gate capacity with ticket sales.
